relations.evidence: tirzepatide was shown to provide substantial and sustained reductions in body weight in persons with obesity
its efficacy in reducing weight and delaying progression to type 2 diabetes in persons with both obesity and prediabetes
SURMOUNT-1 trial, tirzepatide was shown to provide substantial and sustained reductions in body weight
the most common adverse events were gastrointestinal, most of which were mild to moderate in severity
the mean percent change in body weight among the participants who received tirzepatide was -12.3% with the 5-mg dose, -18.7% with the 10-mg dose, and -19.7% with the 15-mg dose
Obesity is a chronic disease and causal precursor to myriad other conditions, including type 2 diabetes
